overview.description: The ARK DIET Q4 Buffer ETF (ARKT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is actively managed and seeks to deliver a defined outcome linked to the ARK Disruptive Innovation ETF (ARKK). The fund aims to absorb roughly half of ARKKs downside over rolling 12-month periods while capturing gains above a 5% hurdle. ARKT was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by ARK.
